author: Priya M.
text: Very cooperative landlord. Fixed the AC within a day of reporting. Highly recommend!

author: Anonymous
text: Generally good. Minor delay in returning deposit but resolved after one follow-up.

author: Karan S.
text: Professional and transparent. Lease agreement was clear with no hidden clauses.

author: Anonymous
text: Horrible experience. Refused to return deposit for months. Had to involve legal help.

author: Meera T.
text: Plumbing issues were reported 4 times. Nothing was fixed. Avoid.

author: Arjun K.
text: Good property. Landlord is a bit slow on repairs but eventually gets things done.

author: Anonymous
text: Rent was hiked 15% without notice. Make sure to get everything in writing.

author: Neha R.
text: Best landlord I've had in 10 years of renting. Proactive, honest, and professional.

author: Dev P.
text: Full deposit returned within 3 days of vacating. No questions asked. 10/10.

author: Rohit D.
text: Average experience. Property is decent but landlord takes time to respond.

author: Anonymous
text: Was charged for repairs that were pre-existing. Document everything before moving in.

author: Ravi Mehta
text: Great landlord, very responsive and professional.
